case_title: TD BANK USA, N.A., AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO VS. MARIA J MORAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A., AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORAN, MARIA J $3,812.70 PRINCIPAL, $383.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,195.70, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 74767543)

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 73388700) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A., AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT MORAN, MARIA J DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-10-2024
